customer_id.description: Stable customer identifier. Kept as a string to preserve leading zeros.

full_name.description: Customer's full name in title case, first and last joined by a space.

price_usd.description: Signup price in US dollars, converted from an integer cents column.

signed_up_at.description: Signup timestamp (ISO-8601, UTC), converted from a Unix epoch-seconds column.

phone.description: Contact phone number, kept verbatim as a string (ID-safe).

country.description: Country code. Not present in the source; defaulted.
